g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do decomposition manifests define field routing and value constraints?')
sendPrompt('How does the CI compatibility check validate decomposition manifests?')
sendPrompt('How is the OTel Collector binary built with the generated decomposer processor?')
sendPrompt('How are SDK type packages generated from manifests and published?')
sendPrompt('How does the OTel Collector decomposer route unified events to metrics, traces, logs, and billing?')
sendPrompt('Describe the thin SDK and unified semantic event model')
sendPrompt('for what purpose we need api gateway?')
sendPrompt('What are the Kafka durability guarantees for billing events?')
